name: Ceramide NP
description: A key skin-identical lipid that restores the skin's natural protective barrier layer.
scientificSummary: Ceramides constitute approximately 50% of the lipid matrix of the stratum corneum, making them essential for barrier function.
mechanismOfAction: Fills gaps between corneocytes in the stratum corneum, sealing the skin barrier and reducing transepidermal water loss.

seo.title: Ceramide NP - Essential Skin Barrier Lipid | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Ceramide NP restores the skin's lipid barrier to prevent moisture loss and sensitivity.
